title: Dotted Rhythms
description: Learn how the dot alters a note's length. Focus on dotted half notes and the dotted-quarter/eighth pair.

sessions.title: Adding Half Again
sessions.description: Learn the mathematical rule of the dotted rhythm.

sessions.title: The Gallop
sessions.description: Master the dotted-quarter followed by an eighth note figure.

levels.criteria: Can accurately perform syncopated and dotted rhythmic figures.
